news.t: Pacer ETFs Launches Two AI-Driven ETFs Leveraging Advanced Machine Learning and Strategic Partnerships

holdings.infoBox: PSAI is an equity ETF with a total of 102 individual holdings. The top holdings are Vertiv Holdings Co stock at 2.83%, Meta Platforms at 2.28%, GE Vernova at 2.01%, Sandisk at 1.98%, and General Motors Company at 1.89%.

overview.description: The Pacer S&P 500 3AI Top 100 ETF (PSAI) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 3AI Top 100 index. The fund passively tracks an index of 100 US stocks, from within the S&P 500 Index, with the highest 12-month excess return potential, identified using AI and machine learning. PSAI was launched on May 7, 2026 and is issued by Pacer.

data.title: Pacer ETFs Launches Two AI-Driven ETFs Leveraging Advanced Machine Learning and Strategic Partnerships
data.text: MALVERN, Pa.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Pacer ETFs launches two AI-powered ETFs leveraging machine learning and proprietary alpha signals developed with S&P Dow Jones Indices and 3AI.
